items.title: How to pay?
items.question: How to pay?
items.answer:
Please tell me your order. I will tell you the price of the item, the shipping cost, the original box fee and the total amount.
We accept Western Union, Wise via SWIFT, bank transfer and USDT cryptocurrency as payment methods. A 30% deposit is required, and the remaining 70% shall be paid before delivery. We will send you product photos and videos for your confirmation prior to shipment.

items.title: Quality Problem
items.question: What If There's A Quality Problem?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day quality guarantee. If there are any manufacturing defects, we'll repair or replace your piece at no extra cost.

items.title: What If The Product Is Out Of Stock?
items.question: What If The Product Is Out Of Stock?
items.answer: Wait about 7 days for the production. For some complicated styles, it takes longer time.Contact us and we'll provide an estimated production time for your specific order.

items.title: How To Know Price
items.question: How To Know The Price?
items.answer: All products on our website show current prices. For custom designs or bulk orders, please contact us for a personalized quote.

items.title: Brand Box Package
items.question: Do You Provide Brand Box & Package?
items.answer: Yes! Every Vespera Jewels piece comes in a premium brand box with elegant packaging, perfect for gifting.

items.title: Quality Confirmation
items.question: How Can I Confirm The Quality?
items.answer: Each piece undergoes rigorous quality inspection before shipping. We provide detailed photos of your specific item and can arrange video calls for verification.

items.title: More Pictures Videos
items.question: Can I Get More Pictures Or Videos?
items.answer: Absolutely! We can send additional photos and videos of any product. Contact us and we'll provide them within 24 hours.

items.title: Personal Wholesale
items.question: Is This Personal Or Wholesale?
items.answer: Vespera Jewels serves both retail and wholesale customers. We offer special pricing for bulk orders and business partnerships.

items.title: Worldwide Shipping
items.question: Do You Ship Worldwide?
items.answer: Yes, we ship to over 100 countries worldwide. All shipments are fully insured and tracked.

items.title: Delivery Time
items.question: How Long Is The Delivery Time?
items.answer: Production takes 7-15 days. Shipping varies by destination: 7-14 days express, 20-30 days standard. We'll provide tracking information.
